General_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL of PCR mix per tube for a total of {Samples} tubes.
Tissue_Specific_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL of PCR mix per tube for a total of {Samples} tubes.
SNP_PCR: Aliquot 3 uL of each lysed sample per desired loci. In another tube, combine {Taq 2X Master Mix} uL of Taq 2X Mix, {Primer Pair} uL of primer mix, and {Autoclaved Water} uL of autoclaved water. Aliquot 22uL of PCR mix per tube for a total of {Samples} tubes.
